Date: June 9, 2026.
The Proposal: -
The meeting was chaired by the Hon'ble Minister (Revenue), Shri. Review meeting held on 26.05.2026
was done. At the meeting, the Additional Chief Secretary (Revenue) made periodic transfers and
A presentation was made on the formulation of a revised policy with regard to promotions. In the
Revenue Division under the Revenue Department, Land Records Division and Registration and Stamps.
Periodic transfers of officers / staff in the subordinate offices of the Fee Division and
Computer system (online) to perform post-promotional postings on the basis of this merit.
The matter of preparation was underlined. The matter of deciding the policy accordingly
The government was concerned.
The Government's Decisions:
The Revenue Division under the Revenue Department, the Land Records Division and the Registration and
Periodical of Officers / Staff of Subordinate Offices of Stamp Duty Division
Online transfers and post-promotions
Committee under the Chairmanship of Divisional Commissioner, Pune to formulate a comprehensive policy.
set up. 30th June, 2026 regarding submission of recommendations of the Planning Commission to the Government.
The directions were given by the Hon'ble Minister (Revenue).
Hence, in pursuance of the above direction, the following Committee is being constituted.
Composition of the Committee: -
table_trans: Commissioner and Director of Deposits, Land Records, Pune
Inspector General of Registration and Controller of Stamps Maharashtra State Pune

para_trans: Government Decision No: Policy-2026 / Q. No.26 / E-1678410 / Aastha-1-A
The functions of the Committee: -

1. To determine the procedure for making periodic transfers and post-promotions of officers / employees in the said offices online. 2. To determine the criteria of merit for periodic transfers and post-promotions of officers / employees.
Determining the career map of the service of the officer / staff while recommending the establishment of the 3.पदस.
4. Also to determine the cadre map of officers / staff.
5. To make recommendations regarding regional balance in relation to the posting of officers and staff in all departments.
6. The Divisional Commissioner, Pune held meetings with the aforesaid members under his chairmanship. The recommendations of the committee should be submitted to the government by June 30, 2026.
4. In this case, the Additional Commissioner, (Revenue), Divisional Commissioner, Office, Pune, issued the Divisional
Meetings should be held and reports given as per the direction of the Commissioner. Government by June 30, 2026
be submitted.
5. This Government Decision is available on the Government of Maharashtra Website www.maharashtra.gov.in
